fields.helpText: The Unit Type Name is a unit name or group that accurately represents 50%  or greater of the patient population or group activity.

The Unit Type Definition is the explanatory text describing the Unit Type. The definition includes the units that fall within the Unit Type.   For example: A Unit Type is MEDICAL.   The MEDICAL Unit Type Definition includes the following units: Internal medicine, family practice, and cardiology.
The Setting is a high level category which contains several Unit Types. For example, the Hospital-Acute Setting contains the Critical Care,  Mental Health Acute, and Surgical Unit Types.
